title: Three Swords Against Six
description: On pages 4–7, three swords against six focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Usopp, Nami as zoro’s injuries worsen during the fight, but he continues battling Hatchan while the others struggle around him.
scene: On pages 4–7, three swords against six focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Usopp, Nami as zoro’s injuries worsen during the fight, but he continues battling Hatchan while the others struggle around him.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'd like to see you try to take on my barrage with only 3 swords!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Toru nagashi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nyudo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He got by!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: to be able to block all 6 blades coming from every direction...! He's amazing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You've reeeaaally made me mad now!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I swear I'll kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Just think about it, logically!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: There's no way you could beat my 6 swords when you only have 3!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Logically...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Seems like you've made a big error in your Calc-ulation.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What are you burdened with?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What do you desire at the limits of your strength?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I may only have 3 swords,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But the weight of our swords are completely different!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He's swallowed a lot of water! If we don't get him out soon, it'll be too late!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Damn it... it's too hard to swing down here...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's too much water resistance...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Gen,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You have to hurry up!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's no good, I can't break the rock!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And it's not like we can carry the rock either...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I wish I had an oxygen tank but there's no time to get one now...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That's it!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
